/usr/bin/ar qc libquicr.a CMakeFiles/quicr.dir/base_track_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quicr.dir/client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quicr.dir/ctrl_message_types.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quicr.dir/__/__/include/quicr/detail/ctrl_messages.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quicr.dir/messages.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quicr.dir/publish_fetch_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quicr.dir/publish_track_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quicr.dir/publish_namespace_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quicr.dir/fetch_track_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quicr.dir/subscribe_track_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quicr.dir/subscribe_namespace_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quicr.dir/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quicr.dir/quic_transport.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quicr.dir/transport.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quicr.dir/transport_picoquic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/quicr.dir/joining_fetch_handler.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libquicr.a
